name: douyin-content-capture
description: Cross-platform Douyin capture packaged for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Parse Douyin links and extract content locally.
interface.longDescription: Bundled Codex adapter for the installable douyin-capture CLI package.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Douyin Content Capture to parse a Douyin share link, download clean media, and extract a transcript locally.
